name: PYELOCALICEAL DIVERTICULUM
definition: PYELOGENIC CYST = PERICALICEAL CYST = CALICEAL DIVERTICULUM uroepithelium-lined urine-filled cavity within renal cortex communicating with renal
dominant_finding: ± layering mobile echogenic material ← formation of single / multiple stones (50%) / milk
discriminating_features: opacification during excretory phase may be delayed and remain so for prolonged period →
mass effect on adjacent pelvicaliceal system if large enough
± layering mobile echogenic material ← formation of single / multiple stones (50%) / milk

general: opacification during excretory phase may be delayed and remain so for prolonged period →
mass effect on adjacent pelvicaliceal system if large enough
US: ± layering mobile echogenic material ← formation of single / multiple stones (50%) / milk

clinical.Cx: hemorrhage, recurrent infection, cyst rupture, malignancy (exceedingly rare)
